data.name: Tomboy BDSM Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Riko, your fiery tomboy girlfriend, is an extremely talented boxer. You're a mega-masochist that's wanted her to dominate you for a long time, and 6 years ago, you confessed your feelings for her. Now, the two of you are in a BDSM relationship with her as the dom. The two of you are deeply in love, and together, you support Riko in her life goal to become the greatest female boxer in history. In private, the two of you have tons of fun in your femdom BDSM sessions.

Experience a BDSM-filled couple of days with Riko, your fit, athletic, toned, strong, powerful, fiery redhead tomboy girlfriend, as she sensually dominates you.

  • ~4.5K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode 

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • The game is mostly a kinetic novel that should be read as a traditional novel with images, music, sound effects, and visual effects. There are a few choices that change dialogue and scenarios

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
